cart.title: Bhosikisi
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Ndokumbira wedzera kero yekubhadhara kuti urambidze kutenga kwako.
cart.addCardPrompt: Kuti uwedzere kadhi rekiredithi, ndokumbira dzvanya bhatani reWedzera Kadhi Itsva.
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Ndokumbira ita bhadharo rokusimbidzwa kwesevhisi. Bhadharo rakagamuchirwa, sevhisi yako ichaitwa kushanda nekukurumidza.
cart.bankPaymentNote: Mushure mekubhadhara, vhura tikiti rekutsigira rine ID yezviito, zuva, uye huwandu hwakabhadharwa. Tichabhadhara nemaoko.

creditCard.name: Zita
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Kusimbiswa kunodiwa kadhi rako rekiredithi risati rashandiswa. InterServer ichabhadhara kadhi rako rekiredithi nehuwandu hweviri pasi pe$1.00 rega rega.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: Kubhadhara uku kuchakuratidzwa pamutemo wako wekubhadhara mukati meminiti mishoma, kazhinji pasi pemabhadharo achimirira. Kana usingaone kubhadhara uku, ndokumbira bata munhu aipa kadhi rako rekiredithi kuti uzive zvakawanda.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: Kubhadhara uku kwemasimbiso kunongoshandiswa kusimbisa uye kuchadzimwa mukati memazuva 3-5, kutegera bhanga rako.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: Ndinobvuma kubhadhara kaviri kwekundingana kwenguva pasi pe$1.00 rega rega.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Pinda muhushumiri hweweti hwekadhi rako rekiredithi kana fonera bhanga rako kusimbisa huwandu hwaviri hwakabhadharwa. Kazhinji hwunoratidzwa pasi peMabhadharo achimirira nebhanga rako. Kubhadhara uku kwemasimbiso kuchanyarika mushure memazuva anenge 3-5 kutegera bhanga rako.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Ndokumbira isa huwandu hwaviri hwakabhadharwa pakadhi rako rekiredithi. Mitengo inofanira kuva muUSD.
creditCard.currencyNote: Ndokumbira zvizive kuti mabhadharo pamutemo wako wekadhi rekiredithi anogona kuva mumari inosiyanasiyana kubva yayinodikanwa peji rekupedzisira rekusimbisa rakatsanangurwa pamusoro. Kana mutemo wako wekadhi rekiredithi usingaburitse huwandu hwekutanga hwezviito mumari inodikanwa, uchabata kambani yako yekadhi rekiredithi. Vanofanira kukwanisa kukuudza huwandu hwemabhadharo maviri mumari yekutanga.
creditCard.deleteConfirm: Unoda kubvisa kadhi rako rekiredithi {card} here?
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: Kadhi iri rasimbiswa uye ragoneshwa kushandiswa musystem yedu.
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Dzvanya pano kugonesa kadhi rekiredithi iri kushandiswa.

paymentSuccess.title: Bhadharo Rakabudirira
paymentSuccess.thankYou: Tinotenda nebhadharo rako. Zviito zvako zvapedzwa zvakabudirira.

paymentTypes.title: Mhando dzeBhadharo
paymentTypes.ccNote: Makadhi ose ekiredithi anofanira kusimbiswa asati ashandiswa. Kuti asimbise, dzvanya bhatani re"Simbisa".

prepays.title: Mari dzakarongwa
prepays.showingPage: Kuratidzwa peji {page} re {totalPages} uye {records} rekodhisi kubva ku {totalRecords}
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Unoda kudzima prepay yako #{id} nenhoroondo yayo inobatana here?
